heading: Failure to participate satisfactorily; penalties
label: 16135 Failure to participate satisfactorily; penalties
notes: Amendments2017—Subsecs. (a)(2), (b). inserted “or 373” before “of title 37”.Pub. L. 115–912006— reenacted section catchline without change and amended text generally. Prior to amendment, section consisted of subsecs. (a) to (c) relating to penalties for failure of a member of the Selected Reserve of the Ready Reserve of an armed force to participate satisfactorily in required training.Pub. L. 109–1632002—Subsec. (c). added subsec. (c).Pub. L. 107–3141996—Subsec. (b)(1)(A). substituted “16131(a)” for “2131(a)”.Pub. L. 104–1061994—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 103–337, § 1663(b)(2)section 2135 of this titleSubsec. (a)(1)(A). , substituted “16132” for “2132”.Pub. L. 103–337, § 1663(b)(6)(A)Subsec. (b)(1)(A). , which directed substitution of “section 16132(a)” for “section 2132(a)”, could not be executed because “section 2132(a)” does not appear in subsec. (b)(1)(A).Pub. L. 103–337, § 1663(b)(6)(B)1988—Subsec. (a)(1). , inserted “, and during which the member has received such assistance,” after “chapter”.Pub. L. 100–689, § 111(b)(6)(A)Subsec. (b)(1)(A). , added subpar. (A) and struck out former subpar. (A) which read as follows: “the number of months of obligated service remaining under the agreement entered into under section 2132(a)(3) divided by the original number of months of such obligation; and”.Pub. L. 100–689, § 111(b)(6)(B)1984— amended section generally, substituting provisions relating to the failure to participate satisfactorily and penalties for provisions which had designated , as the termination date for enlistments qualifying for educational assistance.Pub. L. 98–525Sept. 30, 19851980— substituted “1985” for “1980”.Pub. L. 96–3421978— substituted “1980” for “1978”.Pub. L. 95–485

children.text: be ordered to active duty for a period of two years or the period of obligated service the person has remaining under , whichever is less; orsection 16132 of this title
be subject to the repayment provisions under section 303a(e) or 373 of title 37.

children.heading: .—Effect of Repayment
children.label: b .—Effect of Repayment
children.text: Any repayment under section 303a(e) or 373 of title 37 shall not affect the period of obligation of a member to serve as a Reserve in the Selected Reserve.
